opt3: It can be optimized for the specific real-time requirements of the system.

correct_option: It can be optimized for the specific real-time requirements of the system.

qsns: Which of the following is a disadvantage of using an ASIP over a general-purpose processor?

Which of the following statements is true regarding ASIPs?
opt1: They are designed for a specific application
opt2: They are optimized for high performance
opt3: They have a flexible instruction set
opt4: They are more expensive than general-purpose processors
correct_option: They are designed for a specific application

qsns: Which of the following is a limitation of using an ASIP?

opt2: It is easy to program using high-level languages.
opt3: It can provide a higher level of performance compared to general-purpose processors.
opt4: It is easier to modify the hardware design once it is implemented.
correct_option: It can provide a higher level of performance compared to general-purpose processors.
